search.label: Search wiki pages
search.minChars: Type at least two characters to search.
search.escapeHint: Press Escape or click outside to close search.

error.emailExists: An account with this email already exists.

setPassword.heading: Set a new password
setPassword.description: Your password was reset by an administrator. Choose a new password to continue.

error.alreadyConfigured: Setup is no longer available. An admin account already exists.

error.emailExists: An account with this email already exists
error.signInToChangePassword: Sign in to change your password
error.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters

setup.heading: Welcome to next-wiki
setup.description: Get your wiki ready: create the initial admin account, then choose optional AI, writing mode, and example page setup.

account.title: Create the admin account
account.description: This account owns the wiki. You can add more users later from the admin area.

ai.title: Set up AI with OpenRouter (optional)
ai.description: Connect an OpenRouter account to enable wiki chat, semantic search, and image generation. You can skip this and configure it later in Admin AI settings.
ai.keyHelp: The key is stored encrypted and never shown again.
ai.autoAssignLabel: Automatically assign detected models to AI features
ai.polling: This can take a minute. You can wait or refresh the page.
ai.disabled: AI is disabled by administrator policy. You can continue without AI.

error.authFailed: The OpenRouter key could not be validated. Check the key and try again.
error.rateLimited: OpenRouter rate limit exceeded. Wait a moment and retry.
error.unavailable: OpenRouter is unavailable right now. Retry or skip for now.
error.generic: AI setup failed. You can retry or skip and configure it later.

writingMode.title: Choose a writing mode
writingMode.description: This sets how your wiki handles authored and AI-generated content.

copilot.title: Copilot
copilot.description: Use one collaborative wiki space for people and AI.

features.feature3: No special entry points or hidden spaces

llmWiki.title: LLM Wiki
llmWiki.description: Keep original inputs and generated knowledge in separate Admin-only spaces.

features.feature1: Originals + generated content in isolated spaces
features.feature2: Raw entries preserve their original format
features.feature3: Admin-only access for raw and generated

samplePages.title: Generate example and help pages (optional)
samplePages.description: Create a welcome page, a Markdown syntax guide, and a main features tour as normal wiki pages. You can edit or delete them later.

summary.title: Setup complete
summary.description: Your wiki is ready. Review the setup results below.
summary.configureAiManually: Configure AI providers and models in Admin AI settings.

site.description: A personal knowledge base where you collaborate with AI and continuously feed it better context.

home.tagline: A personal knowledge base where you collaborate with AI and continuously feed it better context.

empty.title: No published pages yet
empty.body: Pages will appear here once an editor publishes them.

read.draftBanner: This page is a draft and not yet published.

error.pathExists: A page with this path already exists.
error.pathReserved: This path is reserved by built-in functionality. Please choose a different path.
error.forbidden: You do not have permission to create pages.
error.rawCategoryRequired: No default raw category is configured. Ask an administrator to create one before adding raw entries.

error.pathExists: A page with this path already exists.
error.pathReserved: This path is reserved by built-in functionality. Please choose a different path.
error.stale: The page was updated in another tab or window. Please reopen it and retry.
error.forbidden: You do not have permission to edit this page.

error.pathExists: A page with this path already exists.
error.pathReserved: This path is reserved by built-in functionality. Please choose a different path.
error.forbidden: You do not have permission to edit page properties.

empty.title: No revisions visible
empty.forbidden: You do not have permission to view this page's history.

error.forbidden: You do not have permission to publish this revision.

error.deleteForbidden: You do not have permission to delete this page
error.createForbidden: You do not have permission to create pages
error.pathExists: A page with this path already exists
error.editForbidden: You do not have permission to edit this page
error.signInToEditProperties: Sign in to edit page properties

translate.title: Translate this page
translate.description: Pick a target language, model, and style to queue a background translation task for this page.
translate.success: Translation task created and running in the background. Check progress later in Translations admin.
translate.error: Failed to create the translation task.

publishLink.title: Publish generated page as link
publishLink.description: Choose the public Wiki path for this generated page.

error.pathExists: A page with this path already exists.

reader.empty: Select a page from the navigator.

raw.noViewer: No dedicated viewer for this content type; showing the extracted text.
raw.invalidConversation: This conversation's structured detail is unavailable right now.

delete.title: Delete page?
delete.message: Delete "{title}"? This hides the page and queues index reconciliation.

fields.frontmatterLabel: Write page metadata to Markdown frontmatter
fields.frontmatterHint: When off, title, date, tags, and summary are stored only in the wiki database without rewriting the Markdown source.
fields.pathHint: Use slashes to create directories, e.g. {example}.

tags.heading: Tags
tags.renamed: Tag renamed and synchronized across {count} pages.
tags.renameDescription: Change the name of “{name}”. Pages using it will be synchronized automatically.
tags.merged: Tags merged and synchronized across {count} pages.
tags.mergeDescription: Move every page associated with “{name}” to another tag.
tags.mergeWarning: The source tag is removed after the merge. Pages using both tags keep only the destination tag.
tags.deleted: Tag deleted and removed from {count} pages.
tags.deleteDescription: Delete “{name}” and remove it from {count} related pages. This creates new page revisions.
tags.selectHint: Select a tag to review its details and related pages.
tags.searchPagesPlaceholder: Search related pages by title or path
tags.noPages: No pages use this tag yet.
tags.noMatchingPages: No related pages match the query.
tags.operationQueued: The operation is queued and related pages are being synchronized.
tags.operationPending: The operation is still running in the background. Its latest state will appear shortly.
tags.duplicate: A tag with this name already exists
tags.title: Tag Management
tags.description: Maintain wiki tags, review where they are used, and clean up duplicate or unused tags.

searchSettings.title: Search Settings
searchSettings.description: Tune full-text, fuzzy, and semantic search alongside result preview display.

fullText.title: Full-text search
fullText.description: Use PostgreSQL full-text retrieval for known terms and multi-word queries.

fuzzy.title: Fuzzy search
fuzzy.description: Use tolerant fragment matching, including Chinese text and near matches.

semantic.title: Vector search
semantic.description: When enabled, header search blends keyword matches with semantic vector results. Disable it for keyword-only search.

immediateTimeout.label: Keyword search timeout (ms)
immediateTimeout.help: Maximum database time for each immediate full-text or fuzzy search. Valid range: 100–2,000 ms; default: 400 ms.

minRelevance.label: Minimum relevance score
minRelevance.help: Only use search or Wiki AI retrieval results whose keyword or vector relevance score is at least this value. Use 0 for permissive matching; try 0.65+ to hide weak matches.

excerpts.title: Result descriptions
excerpts.description: Show a short excerpt under each search result.

excerptLength.label: Description length
excerptLength.help: Approximate character count for each result description. Valid range: 20–500.

searchSettings.lexicalRequired: Keep full-text search or fuzzy search enabled.

pages.title: Page Management
pages.description: Review wiki pages, filter by page metadata, and open common page actions from one administrative view.

delete.title: Delete page?
delete.message: Delete "{title}"? This hides the page and queues index reconciliation.

pages.empty: No pages match the current filters.

move.title: Move to {space}
move.description: Move "{title}" to the {space} space. The content format is adapted automatically (OKF frontmatter is added when moving into Generated).

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.description: Manage system themes for the app shell. Built-in themes are read-only — copy one to customize. Reading content uses each user's personal reading theme.
appearance.selectHint: Select a theme to view or activate it, or copy a built-in to customize.

error.generic: Could not save system theme. Check your CSS and try again.

preview.title: Live preview
preview.heading: Heading level 1
preview.body: Body text shows how paragraphs read with the chosen font and size. Here is a
preview.quote: Blockquotes use the muted color and a left accent border.
preview.listItem: A list item to show spacing and bullets.

analytics.title: Web analytics
analytics.description: Configure third-party analytics providers. Each provider's tracking script is injected into every page when enabled.
analytics.allDisabled: All analytics providers are currently disabled. No tracking scripts will be loaded.
analytics.invalidTrackingId: Tracking ID does not match the expected format.
analytics.enabledRequiresTrackingId: Enable requires a valid Tracking ID.

site.title: Site information
site.description: Configure the site name, icon, footer, and (for China) regulatory filing numbers.

icon.label: Site icon
icon.hint: SVG, PNG, or ICO up to 512 KB. Leave empty to use the default icon.

error.generic: Could not save site information. Check your values and try again.

transfers.title: Content Import and Export
transfers.description: Create portable backups, restore archives, and migrate content from Wiki.js.

export.title: Portable wiki archive
export.description: Export all published Markdown and referenced local images as a versioned ZIP archive.

archive.comingSoon: Upload a portable next-wiki archive to preview and restore its content.
archive.previewReady: The latest archive preview is ready to import.

wikijs.comingSoon: Configure a Wiki.js source to preview and migrate its accessible pages.
wikijs.name: Source name
wikijs.privateNetwork: Allow this trusted Wiki.js host on a private network
wikijs.privateNetworkHelp: By default only public hosts are allowed. Enable this to reach a Wiki.js host on a trusted private network (e.g. an internal IP or self-hosted domain). Only enable it for hosts you trust, to avoid server-side request forgery (SSRF).

detail.cleanupConfirm: Delete the {count} page(s) this import created or replaced and remove them from AI indexes? Pages it skipped are left untouched. This cannot be undone.

storage.title: Content Storage
storage.description: Database is the source of truth. Enable one or more replicas for resilient and lower-cost reads.

database.description: All Markdown and image bytes are committed here first. This backend is always enabled and its configuration is read-only.
database.name: Database name

replica.heading: Replica
replica.description: Enabled replicas receive asynchronous writes from the authoritative Database.
replica.enabledDescription: Receive new content writes and become available as a read source.
replica.databaseAlwaysEnabled: Database is authoritative and cannot be disabled.
replica.preferredDescription: Try this source first and fall back to Database when unavailable.
replica.disableMessage: The replica will stop receiving writes and will no longer serve reads. Choose whether to retain its existing data.
replica.enableMessage: Choose whether existing Database content should be synchronized before this source is used.

active.heading: Active backend
active.migrating: A migration is in progress; content writes are paused.

s3.title: S3-compatible storage
s3.secretConfigured: Secret is configured — leave blank to keep it

git.description: One-way sync of published Markdown and referenced images to a Git remote. Git is never used as a read source.
git.enabledDescription: Sync changes asynchronously to the configured system-owned branch.
git.tokenConfigured: Token is configured — leave blank to keep it
git.sshInstructions: Add this public key as a write-enabled deploy key in GitHub, GitLab, or your Git server.
git.sshMissing: Generate a key, then add the public key to the remote repository before enabling export.
git.keyGenerated: SSH key generated. Configure the public key on the Git remote.
git.exportNotQueued: Git sync could not be queued. Please check the server logs.
git.syncInProgress: A full sync is in progress.
git.syncInProgressSince: A full sync has been running since {time}.
git.enableMessage: The current published state will be synced immediately. Future publish, delete, and path changes will enqueue another reconciliation.
git.autoSyncDescription: Push to Git automatically whenever a new page version is published.
git.autoSyncWarning: Disabling this stops automatic pushes on publish. Newly published versions may be missing from the Git remote until the next manual or scheduled sync.
git.scheduledSyncDescription: Periodically reconcile the full published snapshot to Git as a safety net.

note.activation: Saving stores the configuration. Switching the active backend runs a safe migration.
note.replication: Save and test the configuration before enabling it. Enabling starts an asynchronous Database backfill.

switch.title: Switch to {target}?
switch.message: This copies and verifies all content to {target}, then activates it. Content is read-only during the migration.
switch.overwriteWarning: The {target} backend already contains data, which may be overwritten. Continue?

cleanup.title: Delete retained data?
cleanup.message: Permanently delete all retained content from the inactive {target} backend. This cannot be undone.

migration.heading: Migration
migration.bannerLink: A storage migration is in progress — view status.

sync.heading: Synchronizing existing content
sync.failed: {count} items could not be synchronized and will be retried.

apiAudit.title: Access Log
apiAudit.noEntries: No audit entries match the filters.

resetPassword.securityHint: Share this password securely. The user must set a new password on next sign-in.

delete.title: Delete user?
delete.message: Delete {email}? The account will be unable to sign in and removed from the list; its authorship history is preserved. This cannot be undone.

error.manageForbidden: You do not have permission to manage users
error.cannotRemoveOwnAdmin: You cannot remove your own admin role
error.cannotDisableSelf: You cannot disable your own account
error.cannotDeleteSelf: You cannot delete your own account
error.tempPasswordTooShort: Temporary password must be at least 8 characters

ai.title: AI configuration
ai.description: Configure system providers, model purposes, knowledge indexes, and operational activity.

prompts.title: AI prompts
prompts.description: Customize the system prompts that drive Wiki AI. Leave a field empty to use the built-in default.

assistant.label: Assistant system prompt
assistant.help: The base persona and answering rules shared by Wiki AI question answering and the tool loop. This is the built-in default, shown for editing; changes replace it.

tool.label: Tool system prompt
tool.help: Instructions for the governed tool loop. Keep the '{{TOOLS}}' marker and the fenced tool-call protocol so tools keep working; the live tool catalog is injected automatically.

tools.title: Tools
tools.description: Manage which wiki tools Wiki AI can use and when its changes require review.

provider.externalUnavailable: External MCP providers are not available in this phase.

proposals.title: Change proposals
proposals.conflict: Current state changed since this proposal was prepared.

usage.title: AI usage
usage.description: Completed request counts and token consumption by chat, embedding and image capability.

global.title: Enable AI
global.description: Allow configured providers to process Wiki content.

modelDetector.title: Model capability detector
modelDetector.description: Configure each detector independently. Stored credentials persist per detector, so adding or changing one never clears another.
modelDetector.openrouterHint: A global key used to enrich chat capabilities and discover vendor embedding models.
modelDetector.cloudflareHint: Lists the Workers AI catalog and infers capabilities from each model's schema.
modelDetector.cloudflareEnabledHint: When on, model synchronization pulls the catalog from Cloudflare.
modelDetector.replaceHint: Enter a new value to replace the stored one
modelDetector.cloudflareAccountIdHint: The account whose Workers AI catalog is inspected. Not a secret, but admin-only.
modelDetector.cloudflareTokenHint: A token with Workers AI read access. Stored encrypted and never returned.
modelDetector.registerProviders: Register OpenRouter providers for all capabilities
modelDetector.registerProvidersHint: Create chat, embedding, and image providers from this key. Each is registered under a distinct name.

providers.title: AI providers
providers.description: Manage system-wide provider connections and review the API capabilities exposed by each provider.
providers.addDescription: Credentials are encrypted and never returned by the API.
providers.name: Provider name
providers.syncStarted: Model sync started; track progress in run records.
providers.deleteConfirm: Delete {name} and all of its models, assignments, indexes, and run records? This action cannot be undone.

providerType.chatDescription: Chat and reasoning APIs used for Wiki Q&A and text optimization.
providerType.embeddingDescription: Dedicated embeddings APIs used for vector indexing and retrieval.
providerType.imageDescription: Dedicated image generation APIs used to create Wiki illustrations.

assignments.title: System capability mapping
assignments.description: Map each system AI capability to one configured platform and model.

function.textDescription: Used for Wiki Q&A and selected-text optimization through the Chat API.
function.embeddingDescription: Used to vectorize Wiki content and queries through the Embeddings API.
function.imageDescription: Used to create Wiki illustrations through the Images API or provider image-output API.
function.confirmCapability: Saving confirms that {model} supports this dedicated API.

catalogDescription.__value: Review models available to this capability.
catalogDescription.chat: Review synchronized chat models and their input and reasoning capabilities.
catalogDescription.embedding: Review embedding models discovered from the OpenRouter embeddings catalog or added manually.
catalogDescription.image: Review vendor-defined and manually added image-generation models.

models.partialHint: Some capability evidence could not be fetched during the last sync.
models.empty: No models match the current filters.
models.activateDimensionsHint: Set the embedding dimensions for {name} to activate it. This must match the model's actual output size.

error.inUse: This item is in use and cannot be deleted.

delete.confirm: Delete {name}? This action cannot be undone.

entitlement.question: Wiki question answering
entitlement.dialogDescription: Toggle each capability on or off. Changes save automatically.
entitlement.loadError: Could not load AI access settings.

index.title: Knowledge indexes
index.description: Monitor vector-index generations and rebuild after changing the embedding model.

cancel.confirm: Stop the in-progress build of "{name}"? Partial work is discarded.

index.empty: No knowledge index has been created.

actions.title: AI actions
actions.description: Operational metadata only. Prompts, responses, selections, and image bytes are not retained here.
actions.empty: No AI actions match the current filters.

providerDetail.newApiKey: New API key (leave blank to preserve)

bots.title: Bots
bots.description: Connect chat bots so your team can ask the wiki, search pages, and receive notifications without leaving the conversation.

runtime.title: AI runtime parameters
runtime.description: Tune the Wiki AI tool loop. A per-provider tool policy limit still takes precedence over the max tool calls set here.

connect.title: Connect Feishu by QR code
connect.description: Scan with the Feishu app to bring this wiki into your Feishu workspace. Once connected, your team can chat with the wiki right inside Feishu — no keys or addresses to fill in.
connect.qrAlt: Scan with the Feishu app to link or create the bot
connect.linked: Feishu app linked. Establishing the WebSocket connection.
connect.expired: The QR code expired or linking was cancelled. Generate a new one.
connect.generateFailed: Could not generate the Feishu QR code.

writingMode.title: Writing mode
writingMode.description: Review the instance content-authoring model selected during first-run setup.

modeDescriptions.copilot: People and AI collaborate in the same wiki space.
modeDescriptions.llmWiki: Original inputs and generated knowledge are kept in separate Admin-only spaces.

writingMode.pending: A mode switch is running. Content changes are temporarily paused.

dialog.title: Switch to Copilot
dialog.description: Move LLM Wiki content into the default wiki space.
dialog.warning: Raw and generated pages will be moved in place. Content writes pause until this migration completes.

job.failed: Migration failed. No page moves were committed.

rawCategories.title: Raw categories
rawCategories.description: Manage the taxonomy that files every raw entry under exactly one immutable category.
rawCategories.empty: No categories yet. Create one before adding raw entries.

confirm.retireMessage: Retire "{name}"? Existing entries stay filed, but it will no longer accept new entries.
confirm.deleteMessage: Delete "{name}"? This cannot be undone and is only allowed when no entries reference it.

error.hasEntries: This category cannot be deleted while raw entries still reference it. Retire it instead.

contentDataSources.title: Data Sources
contentDataSources.description: Control which external and internal activity streams are captured as wiki content.
contentDataSources.unavailableReason: Raw content requires LLM Wiki writing mode.

error.unavailable: This source can't be enabled until Raw content is available in the current writing mode.

aiConversations.label: AI Conversations
aiConversations.description: Capture every AI conversation — Wiki AI and Feishu bot — as Raw Conversation pages in the built-in Conversation category.

mermaid.modalDescription: Drag to pan, scroll to zoom. Use the toolbar buttons to zoom in, out, or reset.

plot.title: Function plot
plot.description: Interactive graph of the selected formula. Drag to pan, scroll to zoom.
plot.error: This formula could not be plotted.

nav.loadError: Failed to load. Click to retry.

readingTheme.title: Reading theme
readingTheme.description: Choose the colors, fonts, and sizes used when you read Markdown content. Changes apply inside the reader (the rest of the site keeps the admin system theme).

error.generic: Could not save reading theme. Check your values and try again.

profile.heading: Profile
profile.saveFailed: Could not save profile. Please try again.

preferences.heading: Display preferences
preferences.saveFailed: Could not save preferences. Please try again.

feishu.heading: Connect your Feishu account
feishu.description: Confirm to link the Feishu identity that requested this connection to your Wiki account. You can disconnect it at any time.
feishu.successMessage: Your Feishu account is now connected. You can return to Feishu and ask questions.
feishu.missingToken: This link is missing its connection token. Please start again from Feishu.
feishu.errorGeneric: This connection link is invalid, expired, or already used. Please request a new one from Feishu.
feishu.settingsDescription: Once connected, the bot answers using your Wiki permissions. Each user manages their own binding.
feishu.notAvailable: An administrator has not enabled the Feishu bot yet, so it cannot be connected.
feishu.stepOne: Find this Wiki's bot in Feishu and send it any message.
feishu.stepTwo: The bot sends you a private one-time confirmation link.
feishu.stepThree: Open the link while signed in to this Wiki account and confirm the connection.
feishu.unbindFailed: Could not disconnect Feishu. Please try again.

apiKeys.title: API Keys
apiKeys.scopesHint: Select at least one scope. Scopes cannot be changed later.
apiKeys.revokeConfirm: Are you sure you want to revoke this key?
apiKeys.revokeWarning: Revoked keys cannot be used again.
apiKeys.revokeFailed: Could not revoke the key. Please try again.

scopeDescriptions.storage: Manage content storage configuration and migrations (admin only)
scopeDescriptions.preferences: Update your own theme and language preferences

ai.read: Use AI-powered search and semantic retrieval

apiKeys.maxKeysExceeded: You can have at most {max} active keys.
apiKeys.createdWarning: Copy this key now. It will remain revealable, but this is the only time it is shown automatically.
apiKeys.createdCopyHint: The key is stored encrypted and can be revealed later from this page.

aiSessions.title: AI Chat History
aiSessions.description: Search, review, resume, or permanently delete your past Ask AI conversations.
aiSessions.question: Question
aiSessions.deleteMessage: This permanently deletes the question, answer, and citations. This cannot be undone.
aiSessions.captureImmutable: Captured as Raw evidence — cannot be deleted from history.

chat.title: Wiki AI
chat.providerNotice: Your question and relevant Wiki content may be sent to the configured AI provider.
chat.empty: Ask a question grounded in this Wiki.
chat.insufficient: The Wiki does not contain enough evidence to answer.
chat.capacity: The full Wiki is too large for the selected model. Use retrieval mode.

conversationView.responseInterrupted: The response ended before it could produce a final answer.

tools.title: Tool activity
tools.limitReached: Tool limit reached for this turn.
tools.unavailable: Tool use is unavailable for the selected model.
tools.disabled: That tool is disabled by policy.

optimize.title: Optimize selected text
optimize.stale: The selected text changed. The suggestion was not applied.

image.title: Generate Wiki illustration
image.error: Could not promote the generated image.

admin.title: Translations
admin.subtitle: Configure languages and styles, then translate published pages.

unavailable.title: Translation unavailable
unavailable.body: This page has not been translated into this language yet.

inProgress.body: A translation is being prepared. Please check back soon.

error.TRANSLATION_NOT_FOUND: The translation could not be found.
error.TRANSLATION_ALREADY_RUNNING: This language already has an active run.
error.CAPABILITY_MISMATCH: The selected model cannot generate text.
error.SOURCE_NOT_TRANSLATABLE: The selected page has no eligible published source.
error.JOB_QUEUE_UNAVAILABLE: Background work is unavailable right now.

forbidden.message: You do not have permission to view this page.
